description_long: This is a large, rectangular suitcase with a domed lid, featuring a woven pattern across its dark brown exterior. The front side displays two prominent metal latches for securing the lid, while the back is reinforced with four vertical metal bands for added durability. Both ends of the suitcase are equipped with sturdy black side handles, making it easier to lift and carry. The surface appears to be made of interlaced wood or synthetic strips, bordered by darker leather or faux-leather trim. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage travel trunks, suitable for storing personal belongings or valuables. No visible wheels, brand logos, or external pockets are present.
description: A large, vintage-style suitcase with a woven dark brown exterior, domed lid, metal latches, and side handles. The design is robust and decorative, with no visible wheels or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven pattern, two metal latches, and the domed lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black fixed side handle and the curved top.
description_view_2: Back view displaying four vertical metal reinforcement bands and the woven texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another black fixed side handle and the domed profile.
